items.title: Using machine learning to analyze patterns of anti-Muslim hate speech online in Norway shows that the number of hateful posts is growing and that most are posted by a small group of users who often don’t remain active for long. Engaging with them can be effective in getting them to stop.
items.author: oslomet

items.title: I ran analytics on 43000+ JEE questions as a Machine Learning Engineer helping my sister prep for JEE Advanced
items.author: Ok_Tax9187
items.content:
Pulled the difficulty data across 43,055 questions from JEE Main papers (2019-2025). Here's the subject breakdown nobody talks about:

|Subject|% Easy|% Hard|Avg Difficulty|
|:-|:-|:-|:-|
|Physics|37.4%|1.4%|1.53|
|Chemistry|36.1%|1.4%|1.54|
|Math|6.8%|10.8%|2.03|

Math is 7.7x harder than Physics or Chemistry. And it's getting worse — Math difficulty went from 1.84 in 2019 to 2.12 in 2025. That's 15% harder in 6 years.

The strategic implication most people ignore:

In Physics and Chemistry, 36

items.title: I’m a board-certified dermatologist, machine learning scientist, and co-founder of the teledermatology platform DermFlo - AMA
items.author: DermFlo
items.content: My name is Dr. Vamsi Varra. I’m a board-certified dermatologist, machine learning scientist, and Co-Founder/CEO of DermFlo, a virtual teledermatology platform built for college students who can’t afford the wait or the copay. I do my own ML work in derm independently, including training segmentation models for skin disease severity assessment. AMA on dermatology, telehealth, building health tech as a clinician-founder, or AI in medicine.​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​

items.title: Bańka GenAI popsuła Machine Learning...
items.author: Leniwcowaty
items.content:
Coś dla może bardziej technicznych osób, a może właśnie nie. Może ktoś nie techniczny się tym zainteresuje.

Od razu zaznaczę, bo mi się znudziło czytanie debilnych komentarzy - ten post nie jest napisany przez Gen AI, nie był edytowany, czy przerabiany przez AI. Wszystko napisane przeze mnie osobiście. We cool now?

No więc tak. Gen AI, niektórzy kochają, większość pogardza. Nie dziwię się, też nie przepadam za tą technologią. W sensie rozumiem jej mocne strony, widzę przydatność, ale zwyczajni

items.title: Latest trend in machine learning: shamelessly publishing standard textbook results in control
items.author: NeighborhoodFatCat
items.content:
Another "foundational" paper in ML [https://arxiv.org/pdf/2111.00396](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2111.00396) (cited close to 5000 times). The lemma, which is completed with a proof, can be found in almost all standard textbooks in the control field and even course notes.

Accepted to ICRL 2022 [https://openreview.net/forum?id=uYLFoz1vlAC](https://openreview.net/forum?id=uYLFoz1vlAC) and rated "highly novel".

items.title: College Art Teacher wants AI Generated Content.
items.author: MySchoolsWifiSucks
items.content:
I currently take an online art history class–Introduction to Art.

I'd suspected in the past that the teacher uses AI for assignments with how how they're structured, how text is formatted, incorrect information, and incorrect dates. On top of that, each unit we have to talk to an AI about the Unit content.

Now, for our next assignment–due in about 3 hours–the teacher wants us to generate AI art and have a discussion about said "artworks". This is a genuine, actual interpretation of machine-cre

items.title: Owning Harley x440 is like a humiliation ritual
items.author: Odd-Connection1800
items.content:
So recently a friend of mine bought the Harley X440.

He was always a fan of bikes but came from a financially strained family and struggled a lot to find stability in life. Last year he managed to pay off his education and his family’s personal loans and got a well-paying job.

The bike was symbolic to him. I didn’t want to be a prick and split hairs telling him it’s “not a real Harley” like some people do, I was just genuinely happy to see him finally reach a place in life where he could enjoy

items.title: Sew excited to start learning! First Machine!
items.author: texasbarkintrilobite
items.content: My local sewing shop (Northwest Sewing Center in Austin, Texas) had an outstanding sale on new machines and as a bonus, they offer unlimited classes with the purchase of the machine. I am going to take advantage of that and start developing some skills. My goals are to make Curtains and Potholders for around the house, custom bags for my ham radio field gear, and most fun, renfaire costumes!
